sprints.goal: Roll out scored QASC production-package audits repo by repo.
candidateWork: Run QASC loop until score reaches 100/100 or named external blocker.
Capture QASC report and machine evidence.
Hand off remaining remediation through owner repo packages.
acceptance: Each repo has QASC score evidence.
Each repo has MPR and SIGNAL evidence.
Each repo has explicit owner/action/blocker when below benchmark.
